ageGroups.meaningfulText: The small brown dog ran quickly across the green field. It was chasing a bright red ball that bounced higher and higher. The children laughed and clapped as they watched the happy dog play in the warm afternoon sun.

zalkome  plinduf  grewsap  thinvol
ageGroups.meaningfulText: A little bird sat on the top of a tall tree. It sang a beautiful song every morning. The people in the village loved to listen to the bird as they walked to the market on the dusty road.

ageGroups.meaningfulText: The ancient clock tower chimed midnight, echoing through the empty, cobblestone streets. A thick fog rolled in from the harbor, wrapping the sleeping city in a quiet embrace. Only the solitary lighthouse pierced the gloom.
